description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow named Build GEM Packages that can be triggered manually or called by another workflow. The workflow takes optional inputs for Ice version, GEM repository URL, and repository username. It runs on an ubuntu-24.04 environment, checks out the repository, sets up C++, Ruby, and caching, installs build dependencies, updates the GEM version if specified, builds the GEM package, uploads it as an artifact, and publishes it to a GEM repository if repository credentials are provided.
